issue.message: org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.ModuleDescriptor appears to be part of the old K1 Kotlin compiler. Avoid using it if possible; K1 will be going away soon.
org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.DescriptorVisibilities appears to be part of the old K1 Kotlin compiler. Avoid using it if possible; K1 will be going away soon.
org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.DescriptorVisibility appears to be part of the old K1 Kotlin compiler. Avoid using it if possible; K1 will be going away soon.

org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.DescriptorVisibility appears to be part of the old K1 Kotlin compiler. Avoid using it if possible; K1 will be going away soon.
issue.errorLine1: visibility = targetType.visibility // always public or internal
